turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This is an attempt to collect a debt. Any information obtained will be used for that purpose. This is [AGENT_NAME] from [AGENCY_NAME]. I am a debt collector. May I speak with [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [quietly] This is [CONSUMER_NAME]. What do you want?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. Can you verify the last four of your Social for me?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: It's [SSN_LAST4]. Why do you need that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: And you still live at [STREET_ADDRESS]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah. What is this about?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ms. [CONSUMER_NAME], I've called you four times this week. You owe [DEBT_AMOUNT] to [CREDITOR_NAME]. This has been sitting unpaid for four months. When are you going to pay up?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I'm going through a really hard time right now. I lost my job last month and my unemployment hasn't started yet.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's not my problem. You borrowed the money, now pay it back. Look, if you don't make a payment by Friday, we're going to take action. We call people like you every day, and they always pay eventually.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [voice shaking] What kind of action? You can't just do whatever you want.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We can garnish your wages. We have your employer on file — [EMPLOYER_NAME], right? We will contact your payroll department starting Monday if you don't send at least three hundred by Friday.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [crying] That's not even legal... I looked it up. You need a court order for that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You think we need a court order? We've been doing this for twenty years. Pay the three hundred or we'll also file a lien on your car. And there's a warrent — warrant — that could be issued for your arrest if you keep ignoring this.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: A warrant? For a credit card? That's not true. You're lying to me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm not lying. It's in the system. The creditor has authorized us to pursue all available remedies. Your choice is simple: pay three hundred by Friday, or we escalate. Stop being so damn difficult.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [crying harder] I don't have three hundred. I have forty dollars in my account. I told you I lost my job.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Then borrow it. Ask your family. Sell something. We're not a charity. If you don't pay, we'll keep calling. Every day. Twice a day. Until you do.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Please stop. I can't handle this right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Then pay. It's that simple. I'll expect that three hundred by Friday. Don't make me call back.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I'm hanging up. I'm going to tell someone about this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yeah, go ahead. We'll be calling back tomorrow. And the day after. Count on it.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [inaudible]

turns.speaker: system
turns.text: [Click]

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello? [pause] They always hang up.
